mechanics.raw_text:
Favorite Vidshow: The Nightly Test Pattern ‘Treasonous Possessions: None Current Secret Society Mission: Armed Forces _g00ns have been tashin’ Sierra Club hangouts in ‘Outdoors. Wands-R-FUL1 of Butch-R-BLK! is an ‘Armed Forces plant. Find out which and pop his ‘or her head right off Or just pop both their heads off. By the way, watch that geek Mick RTHY2: he's obviously an intSec plant 
Favorite Holiday: Breakfast Appreciation Day Favorite Food: Sludgettes with Xtra Nitrites! Favorite Vidshow: Rack of Fortune with VansRWHT Treasonous Possessions: One-hundred litle yellow pills hidden in heel of right boot. (Part of your Free Enterprise mission; see below.) Current Secret Society Mission: Some time dur- ing the mission, somebody is going to jump up and yell, “Alice, we're all going to die!” Thats the password. You are to slip off alone with that clone and turn the litle yellow pills over to him or her The clone in return will hand you 2500 credits in simall ills. Take the credits back to your dorm as soon as possible, Eat them if you are captured. In addition: Stove-R-STN:1 recently killed one of FE'S operatives, Balance the books.
